tasks.subject: Task 0: Package skeleton + core types


tasks.subject: Task 21: Vertical-slice pipeline (OSSE + OSE)
tasks.description:
**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Close only after every acceptance criterion is independently re-validated with captured output.

**Goal:** run_pipeline wires source->executor->evaluate->sink; OSSE (truth rmse + calibration) and OSE (withheld CryoSat-2) on fixtures; polar-void exercised; python -m regatta runs.

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/integration/test_vertical_slice.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/regatta/application/pipeline.py", "src/regatta/__main__.py", "tests/integration/test_vertical_slice.py", "tests/integration/config_osse.json"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/integration/test_vertical_slice.py -v", "modelTier": "standard", "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "gateScope": "all"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 22: Correctness oracle (opt-in) + fixture smoke + docs
tasks.description:
**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Close only after every acceptance criterion is independently re-validated with captured output.

**Goal:** Opt-in oracle (within 10% of ODC OI baseline, skipif no data/network) + always-on fixture smoke (<=25%) + oracle-runbook docs.

**Verify:** pixi run test tests/oracle/test_oi_oracle.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/oracle/test_oi_oracle.py", "tests/oracle/conftest.py", "docs/oracle-runbook.md", "pyproject.toml"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/oracle/test_oi_oracle.py -v", "modelTier": "standard", "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "gateScope": "all", "requireEvidenceTokens": [["oracle", "cached", "REGATTA_ODC_DATA"], ["fixture", "smoke", "tiny"]]}
```
